summary: Drafted Chapter 22 'What the Water Chose' — final chapter, Lirien Dael POV, 4,322 words across 3 scenes (SCN-62: 1,395w, SCN-63: 1,172w, SCN-64: 1,753w). HFN resolution chapter: Lirien wakes to the first morning without the binding, processes institutional hedge from the Conclave, watches Kaelith outgrow vindication, and chooses to stay — 'I stay because I want to.' All three thematic pillars resolved (trust proven through rest, right choice as daily decision, chosen love over compelled attachment). Foreshadowing payoffs: FS-013 (Ashborne support), FS-014 (freeholder model), FS-017 (water imagery). Mystery boxes closed: MB-014, MB-015. Symbolic motifs resolved: water-as-choice, Pallor-as-possibility, Oathbrand-as-anchor. Chapter closes with extended river metaphor — 'That was not flowing. That was deciding.' All craft tools applied per profile. All tracker artifacts updated.
